items.speaker: Rover
items.text: Am I early? Where's that person Carlotta sent...

items.speaker: Confused Vault Staff
items.text: We can clock out now? I didn't know Treasurer Pacino had taken up charity work!

items.speaker: Lazy Vault Staff
items.text: Yeah whatever, it's a paid day off. I could do with a nap anyway...

items.speaker: Zani
items.text: Ah, there you are. It's been a while since we last worked together.

items.speaker: Zani
items.text: I was not expecting you to take this job.

options.text: I expect a favor in return.

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: Carlotta promised a generous reward once it's done.

items.speaker: Zani
items.text: Ah, well worth the trip then.

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: An opportunity like this doesn't come round often.

items.speaker: Zani
items.text: The family's favor is more precious than money. Remember to use it on something worthwhile.

items.speaker: Zani
items.text: Now about the job—Lady Carlotta must have briefed you in her letter. I'm curious what the Order is thinking stashing their relic in the Montelli vault.

items.speaker: Zani
items.text: At any rate, my job here is to keep you safe. Take this pass, it's the only one that allows visitors access to the vault's interior.

items.speaker: Zani
items.text: Time to go. The Order's rep is waiting for us.
